about.title: About us
about.subtitle: Itterem is a heartfelt restaurant project where great food, warm service, and a homely atmosphere meet.
about.storyParagraph1: Itterem opened its doors in 2018 in a small downtown corner location. Our founders, Peter Kovacs and Erzsebet Nagy, have always believed that simple dishes made from great ingredients are the most memorable ones.
about.storyParagraph2: Today we already have more than 200 returning guests, and every day we open our doors with one goal: to put something delicious on the table with care and soul.

freshness.title: Freshness and quality
freshness.body: We cook with fresh ingredients every day, sourced from local producers.

hospitality.title: Guest-first hospitality
hospitality.body: We give every guest personal attention.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.body: Our packaging is recyclable and we actively reduce waste.

peter.bio: A chef with 15 years of experience who loves experimenting with flavour.

erzsebet.bio: A hospitality enthusiast who keeps every day running smoothly.

david.bio: His signature desserts make every visit memorable.

footer.tagline: Fresh ingredients and heartfelt dishes every day for every guest.

notFound.title: Page not found
